tags.name: `mc-input-date`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component for user date input with various customization options.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to collect user date input in a form.
When not to use: When you need to display non-input content.
Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs
Alternative component names: Date Input, Form Date Input, Date Field, Date Picker

Events:

  * `input` {`InputEvent`} - Fired when the character is entered.

  * `inputdateselected` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Fired only when date is selected in the calendar.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input-date is focused.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input-date is going out of focus.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired on mc-input-date click.

  * `keydown` {`KeyboardEvent`} - Fired when a key on keydown is pressed.

  * `clearbuttonclick` {`CustomEvent`} - Fires when the clear button is pressed.

  * `trailingiconclick` {`CustomEvent`} - Fires when the trailing icon (calendar) is clicked.

Slots:

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-input-date.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-input-date.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-input-date.

  * ``footer`` {} - Calendar footer slot.

Attributes:

  * `activedate` {`string | null`} - 

  * `customstyles` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `locale` {`string`} - 

  * `nextlabel` {`string`} - 

  * `dayperiod` {`"long" | "short" | "narrow"`} - 

  * `placeholder` {`string`} - 

  * `previouslabel` {`string`} - 

  * `showadjacentmonthdays` {`boolean`} - 

  * `showweeknumbers` {`boolean`} - 

  * `startofweek` {`number`} - Start of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ...)

  * `format` {`string`} - Date format to be used to populate input field. Check The day.js website for available formatting options

  * `customize` {`CellCustomizationPayload[] | undefined`} - A set of dates to customize.

  * `calendarposition` {`Position`} - Position on the calendar.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render in month-year picker.

  * `open` {`boolean | undefined`} - Whether to open the calendar on render.

  * `usemask` {`boolean`} - Whether to use input mask on the input field. The mask will be based on the provided format YYYY-MM-DD by default.

Properties:

  * `internals` {`ElementInternals`} - 

  * `selectedDate` - 

  * `actionKeys` {`string[]`} - 

  * `isTrailingIconFocused` {`boolean`} - 

  * `activedate` {`string | null`} - 

  * `customstyles` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `locale` {`string`} - 

  * `nextlabel` {`string`} - 

  * `dayperiod` {`"long" | "short" | "narrow"`} - 

  * `placeholder` {`string`} - 

  * `previouslabel` {`string`} - 

  * `showadjacentmonthdays` {`boolean`} - 

  * `showweeknumbers` {`boolean`} - 

  * `mcCalendar` - 

  * `mcPopover` - 

  * `mcDrawer` - 

  * `trailingicon` {`string`} - 

  * `clickabletrailingicon` {`boolean`} - 

  * `trailingiconlabel` {`string`} - 

  * `autocomplete` {`string`} - 

  * `startofweek` {`number`} - Start of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ...)

  * `format` {`string`} - Date format to be used to populate input field. Check The day.js website for available formatting options

  * `customize` {`CellCustomizationPayload[] | undefined`} - A set of dates to customize.

  * `calendarposition` {`Position`} - Position on the calendar.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render in month-year picker.

  * `open` {`boolean | undefined`} - Whether to open the calendar on render.

  * `usemask` {`boolean`} - Whether to use input mask on the input field. The mask will be based on the provided format YYYY-MM-DD by default.

  * `validity` {`ValidityState`} - 

  * `bodyOverflow` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `bodyPostion` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `windowScrollTop` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `viewport` {`Viewport | undefined`} - 

  * `viewportResizeHandlerInFullScreenModal` - This is to revert modal body being pushed by the keyboard when
modal is displayed upon focusing on an input,
or close the modal when doing window resize while the modal is open.

  * `handleResize` -
